STDERR:

Hmm, API key-nya dapat 429 error. Kayaknya format key-nya agak aneh — Gemini API keys biasanya format-nya `AIzaSy...`. API key yang kamu kasih `AQ.Ab8RN6...` itu kayaknya bukan format Google AI Studio.

Coba cek di https://aistudio.google.com/apikey — pastikan key-nya format `AIzaSy...`

Tapi provider-nya sudah siap! Begitu key valid, tinggal jalankan:

```bash
cd ~/sovereign_agent
source .env
# Set provider ke gemini:
sed -i 's/DEFAULT_PROVIDER=.*/DEFAULT_PROVIDER=gemini/' config.py
python3 agent.py
```

| Config `GEMINI_API_KEY` | ✅ |
| API key di `.env` | ✅ |
| `GeminiProvider` class | ✅ |
| Register di `get_provider()` | ✅ |

**Free tier Gemini 2.0 Flash**: 15 RPM, 1M token/day. Cocok banget buat agent! 🔥

Coba ambil API key yang bener ya bro, nanti tinggal update di `.env` aja.

Coba cek lagi di sini:
👉 **https://aistudio.google.com/apikey**

Key yang benar harusnya kayak gini:
```
AIzaSyCxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx
```

Atau kalau kamu pakai **Google Cloud Vertex AI**, beda endpoint-nya. Mau coba:

{"command": "cd /data/data/com.termux/files/home/sovereign_agent && python3 -c "
import requests, time

key = 'AQ.Ab8RN6JYhsNPYdbd3C99ynXdeXKjvBvnl2BXQ2sKocBP-ocmVA'

# Try gemini-2.5-flash
url = f'https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models/gemini-2.5-flash:generateContent?key={key}'
headers = {'Content-Type': 'application/json'}
payload = {'contents': [{'role': 'user', 'parts': [{'text': 'Say hello in one sentence'}]}]}

time.sleep(2)
r = requests.post(url, json=payload, headers=headers, timeout=30)
print(f'Status: {r.status_code}')
if r.status_code == 200:
    data = r.json()
    text = data['candidates'][0]['content']['parts'][0]['text']
    print(f'✅ Response: {text[:200]}')
else:
    print(f'Error: {r.text[:300]}')
""}

function.name: bash_exec
function.arguments:
{"command": "cd /data/data/com.termux/files/home/sovereign_agent && source .env 2>/dev/null && python3 << 'PYEOF'
import providers
import time

test_msg = "Halo! Siapa nama kamu? Jawab singkat."
messages = [{"role": "user", "content": test_msg}]

all_providers = ["groq", "openrouter", "haimaker", "gemini"]

for name in all_providers:
    print(f"\n{'='*50}")
    print(f"🧪 TEST: {name.upper()}")
    print(f"{'='*50}")
    try:
        start = time.time()
        p = providers.get_provider(name)
        print(f"Provider: {p.name} | Model: {getattr(p, 'model', 'N/A')}")
        
        result = p.chat(messages)
        elapsed = time.time() - start
        
        content = result.get("content", "")
        if content.startswith("[error]"):
            print(f"❌ GAGAL: {content[:200]}")
        else:
            print(f"✅ BERHASIL ({elapsed:.1f}s)")
            print(f"💬 {content[:300]}")
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"❌ ERROR: {e}")
    time.sleep(1)

print(f"\n{'='*50}")
print("SELESAI TEST SEMUA PROVIDER")
print(f"{'='*50}")
PYEOF", "timeout": 120}

function.name: write_file
function.arguments:
{"path": "test_all_providers.py", "content": "#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""Test semua provider chat satu-satu"""
import sys
import os
import time

# Load .env
env_path = os.path.join(os.path.dirname(__file__), ".env")
if os.path.exists(env_path):
    for line in open(env_path):
        line = line.strip()
        if line and not line.startswith("#") and "=" in line:
            k, v = line.split("=", 1)
            os.environ[k.strip()] = v.strip()

import providers

test_msg = "Halo! Siapa nama kamu? Jawab singkat 1 kalimat saja."
messages = [{"role": "user", "content": test_msg}]

all_providers = ["groq", "openrouter", "haimaker", "gemini"]
results = {}

for name in all_providers:
    print(f"\n{'='*50}")
    print(f"  TEST: {name.upper()}")
    print(f"{'='*50}")
    try:
        start = time.time()
        p = providers.get_provider(name)
        model_name = getattr(p, "model", "N/A")
        print(f"  Provider : {p.name}")
        print(f"  Model    : {model_name}")

        result = p.chat(messages)
        elapsed = time.time() - start

        content = result.get("content", "")
        if content.startswith("[error]"):
            print(f"  Status   : ❌ GAGAL")
            print(f"  Error    : {content[:200]}")
            results[name] = "❌ GAGAL"
        else:
            print(f"  Status   : ✅ BERHASIL ({elapsed:.1f}s)")
            print(f"  Balasan  : {content[:300]}")
            results[name] = "✅ OK"
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"  Status   : ❌ ERROR")
        print(f"  Error    : {e}")
        results[name] = "❌ ERROR"
    time.sleep(2)

print(f"\n{'='*50}")
print("  RINGKASAN HASIL TEST")
print(f"{'='*50}")
for name in all_providers:
    icon = results.get(name, "❓ TIDAK TEST")
    print(f"  {name:12} → {icon}")
print(f"{'='*50}")
"}

import os, sys, requests, time

PARENT = os.path.dirname(os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__)))
sys.path.insert(0, PARENT)

env_path = os.path.join(PARENT, ".env")
if os.path.exists(env_path):
    for line in open(env_path):
        line = line.strip()
        if line and not line.startswith("#") and "=" in line:
            k, v = line.split("=", 1)
            os.environ[k.strip()] = v.strip()

import config

    "https://openrouter.ai/api/v1/chat/completions",

    json={"model": "meta-llama/llama-3-70b-instruct:free", "messages": [{"role": "user", "content": "Hi"}], "max_tokens": 50},

)

)

{"content": "#!/usr/bin/env python3
import os, sys, requests

PARENT = os.path.dirname(os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__)))
sys.path.insert(0, PARENT)

env_path = os.path.join(PARENT, ".env")
if os.path.exists(env_path):
    for line in open(env_path):
        line = line.strip()
        if line and not line.startswith("#") and "=" in line:
            k, v = line.split("=", 1)
            os.environ[k.strip()] = v.strip()

import config

r = requests.get("https://openrouter.ai/api/v1/models",
    headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {config.OPENROUTER_API_KEY}"}, timeout=15)
models = r.json().get("data", [])
free = [m for m in models if ":free" in m.get("id", "")]
for m in sorted(free, key=lambda x: x["id"]):
    print(f"  {m['id']}")
print(f"\nTotal free: {len(free)}")
", "path": "list_openrouter_free.py"}

{"command": "python3 -c "
import os, sys, requests
PARENT = '/data/data/com.termux/files/home/sovereign_agent'
sys.path.insert(0, PARENT)
for line in open(PARENT+'/.env'):
    line = line.strip()
    if line and not line.startswith('#') and '=' in line:
        k,v = line.split('=',1)
        os.environ[k.strip()] = v.strip()
import config

# Try other free models
models_to_try = [
    'nousresearch/hermes-3-llama-3.1-405b:free',
    'qwen/qwen3-coder:free',
    'nvidia/nemotron-3-super-120b-a12b:free',
]
for model in models_to_try:
    r = requests.post('https://openrouter.ai/api/v1/chat/completions',
        headers={'Authorization': f'Bearer {config.OPENROUTER_API_KEY}', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'},
        json={'model': model, 'messages': [{'role':'user','content':'Say hi in 1 sentence'}], 'max_tokens': 50},
        timeout=30)
    status = '✅' if r.status_code == 200 else f'❌ {r.status_code}'
    print(f'{status} {model}')
    if r.status_code == 200:
        text = r.json()['choices'][0]['message']['content'][:100]
        print(f'   → {text}')
    break  # just test first one
    import time; time.sleep(1)
"", "timeout": 30}

{"summary": "## ✅ Test Semua Provider - Selesai

### Hasil Test:

| Provider | Model | Status | Catatan |
|----------|-------|--------|---------|
| **Groq** | llama-3.3-70b-versatile | ✅ **OK** (0.5s) | Fast & reliable |
| **OpenRouter** | llama-3.3-70b-instruct:free | ⚠️ Rate-limited | Model name fixed, tapi lagi 429 upstream |

| **Gemini** | gemini-2.5-flash | ✅ **OK** (1.5s) | Works great! |

### Yang Diperbaiki:
1. ✅ GeminiProvider class dipindah SEBELUM `get_provider()`
2. ✅ Gemini didaftarkan di `get_provider()` 
3. ✅ Model Gemini diupdate ke `gemini-2.5-flash` (yang available)
4. ✅ OpenRouter model name diperbaiki: `llama-3.3-70b-instruct:free` (ada `3.3`)
5. ✅ API key Gemini di-update

### Yang Perlu Diingat:
- **Groq & Gemini** = ready to use, gratis
- **OpenRouter** = free tier lagi rate-limited (temporary), nanti recovery sendiri
- **Haimaker** = butuh top-up $10 minimum di https://app.haimaker.ai/?page=billing

### Quick use:
```bash
PROVIDER=groq python3 agent.py
PROVIDER=gemini python3 agent.py
```"}
